title: Cheesy Pie Baked Wontons
description: A fusion of Chinese wontons and Western pie, filled with a creamy cheese mixture. A fun twist on a classic dessert.
instructions: Cut the pie crust into small squares.
Place a wonton wrapper in the center of each square.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Greek yogurt, butter, and shredded cheese.
Place a small spoonful of the cheese mixture onto the center of each wonton.
Brush the edges of the wonton with water, then fold the pie crust square over to form a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the wontons on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the wontons are golden brown.
